data.name: Hentai Clicker: Valentine is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Valentine is streaming

Enter the lustful stage of Valentine, your seductive futanari goddess with scarlet hair and a wicked smile. Every click fuels her perverse hunger, driving her to show off more, tease harder, and explode with shameless ecstasy as you push her limits.

🍓 About the Game

Hentai Clicker: Valentine is streaming fuses fast-paced clicker mechanics with the intoxicating thrill of futanari fantasies. Each tap brings Valentine closer to the edge—moaning, posing, and revealing her kinks. Collect juicy hearts to unlock naughty outfits, lewd animations, and explosive futa scenes that will leave you addicted.

🔞 NSFW Scenes

Dive into a raw futanari experience: Valentine takes you from playful stroking and cocky teasing to hardcore domination and messy endings. Every scene is fully animated, dripping with heat and attitude.

🎉 Features

💋 Seductive Futanari Idol – Scarlet hair, sultry eyes, and a perfect futa body.
🖱️ Clicker Madness – Easy to play, dangerously addicting.
💗 Unlockable Outfits – From sexy lingerie to wild fetish gear.
🔊 Lewd Voice Acting – Valentine reacts to every click with moans, taunts, and dirty whispers.
🔥 Progression & Goals – Stack hearts, max her arousal, and unlock her most unhinged fantasies.

💖 Why You’ll Love It

If futanari is your guilty pleasure, Valentine is here to wreck your sanity. With her teasing dominance, throbbing lust, and endless stamina, she’s not just streaming—she’s performing for you. And you’ll beg for more.

🎮 How to Play

🖱️ Click to Collect Hearts – Every tap makes her hotter, harder, dirtier.
🔓 Unlock Futa Scenes – Use your hearts to strip her, pose her, and push her buttons.
💥 Upgrade Skills – Speed things up, intensify reactions, and unleash her futa frenzy.

🎉 Start Your Valentine Fever!

Ready to give in to futanari temptation? 😈
Jump into Hentai Clicker: Valentine is streaming and let her take you deeper than you’ve ever dared.

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 義大利文, 德文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 韓文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
